title: Anthropic Just Replaced Claude Code With New Claude Tag
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, a team-based version of Claude Code that operates within Slack, integrating with company tools and enabling task management in shared channels. This represents a shift in AI deployment from private chat interfaces to collaborative enterprise workflows.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's launch of Claude Tag, a team-based version of Claude Code that runs inside Slack. It integrates with company tools and supports task management in shared channels, moving AI agents out of private chat interfaces and into collaborative enterprise workflows. The key takeaway: Anthropic is positioning Claude as a shared, team-facing agent rather than a one-to-one assistant.
